description: Generate a stochastic turbulent wind field using QBlade's Turbulent Windfield Generator. Configure the wind field with a 60-second duration, 0.05s time step, 32x32 grid points, and 120mx120m size. Set the flow parameters to a Mean Velocity of 18 m/s, Turbulence Intensity of 14%, and Hub Height of 90m. Use the IEC Kaimal Model with a Random Seed of 9999. Save the resulting binary wind field file to /home/ga/Documents/windfields/kaimal_18ms_turb.bin.
